15: // See ../ops/image_ops.cc for details.
16: #define EIGEN_USE_THREADS
17: 
18: #include "tensorflow/core/framework/op_kernel.h"
19: #include "tensorflow/core/framework/register_types.h"
20: #include "tensorflow/core/framework/tensor.h"
21: #include "tensorflow/core/framework/tensor_shape.h"
22: #include "tensorflow/core/framework/types.h"
23: #include "tensorflow/core/lib/core/errors.h"
24: #include "tensorflow/core/platform/logging.h"
25: 
26: namespace tensorflow {
27: 
28: namespace {
29: 
30: std::vector<std::vector<float>> DefaultColorTable(int depth) {
31:   std::vector<std::vector<float>> color_table;
32:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({1, 1, 0, 1}));      // 0: yellow
33:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0, 0, 1, 1}));      // 1: blue
34:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({1, 0, 0, 1}));      // 2: red
35:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0, 1, 0, 1}));      // 3: lime
36:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0.5, 0, 0.5, 1}));  // 4: purple
37:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0.5, 0.5, 0, 1}));  // 5: olive
38:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0.5, 0, 0, 1}));    // 6: maroon
39:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0, 0, 0.5, 1}));  // 7: navy blue
40:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({0, 1, 1, 1}));    // 8: aqua
41:   color_table.emplace_back(std::vector<float>({1, 0, 1, 1}));    // 9: fuchsia
42: 
43:   if (depth == 1) {
44:     for (int64 i = 0; i < color_table.size(); i++) {
45:       color_table[i][0] = 1;
46:     }
47:   }
48:   return color_table;
49: }
50: }  // namespace
51: 
52: template <class T>
53: class DrawBoundingBoxesOp : public OpKernel {
54:  public:
55:   explicit DrawBoundingBoxesOp(OpKernelConstruction* context)
56:       : OpKernel(context) {}
57: 
58:   void Compute(OpKernelContext* context) override {
59:     const Tensor& images = context->input(0);
60:     const Tensor& boxes = context->input(1);
61:     const int64 depth = images.dim_size(3);
62: 
63:     OP_REQUIRES(context, images.dims() == 4,
64:                 errors::InvalidArgument("The rank of the images should be 4"));
65:     OP_REQUIRES(
66:         context, boxes.dims() == 3,
67:         errors::InvalidArgument("The rank of the boxes tensor should be 3"));
68:     OP_REQUIRES(context, images.dim_size(0) == boxes.dim_size(0),
69:                 errors::InvalidArgument("The batch sizes should be the same"));
70: 
71:     OP_REQUIRES(
72:         context, depth == 4 || depth == 1 || depth == 3,
73:         errors::InvalidArgument("Channel depth should be either 1 (GRY), "
74:                                 "3 (RGB), or 4 (RGBA)"));
75: 
76:     const int64 batch_size = images.dim_size(0);
77:     const int64 height = images.dim_size(1);
78:     const int64 width = images.dim_size(2);
79:     std::vector<std::vector<float>> color_table;
80:     if (context->num_inputs() == 3) {
81:       const Tensor& colors_tensor = context->input(2);
82:       OP_REQUIRES(context, colors_tensor.shape().dims() == 2,
83:                   errors::InvalidArgument("colors must be a 2-D matrix",
84:                                           colors_tensor.shape().DebugString()));
85:       OP_REQUIRES(context, colors_tensor.shape().dim_size(1) >= depth,
86:                   errors::InvalidArgument("colors must have equal or more ",
87:                                           "channels than the image provided: ",
88:                                           colors_tensor.shape().DebugString()));
89:       if (colors_tensor.NumElements() != 0) {
90:         color_table.clear();
91: 
92:         auto colors = colors_tensor.matrix<float>();
93:         for (int64 i = 0; i < colors.dimension(0); i++) {
94:           std::vector<float> color_value(4);
95:           for (int64 j = 0; j < 4; j++) {
96:             color_value[j] = colors(i, j);
97:           }
98:           color_table.emplace_back(color_value);
99:         }
100:       }
101:     }
102:     if (color_table.empty()) {
103:       color_table = DefaultColorTable(depth);
104:     }
105:     Tensor* output;
106:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(
107:         context,
108:         context->allocate_output(
109:             0, TensorShape({batch_size, height, width, depth}), &output));
110: 
111:     output->tensor<T, 4>() = images.tensor<T, 4>();
112:     auto canvas = output->tensor<T, 4>();
113: 
114:     for (int64 b = 0; b < batch_size; ++b) {
115:       const int64 num_boxes = boxes.dim_size(1);
116:       const auto tboxes = boxes.tensor<T, 3>();
117:       for (int64 bb = 0; bb < num_boxes; ++bb) {
118:         int64 color_index = bb % color_table.size();
119:         const int64 min_box_row =
120:             static_cast<float>(tboxes(b, bb, 0)) * (height - 1);
121:         const int64 min_box_row_clamp = std::max<int64>(min_box_row, int64{0});
122:         const int64 max_box_row =
123:             static_cast<float>(tboxes(b, bb, 2)) * (height - 1);
124:         const int64 max_box_row_clamp =
125:             std::min<int64>(max_box_row, height - 1);
126:         const int64 min_box_col =
127:             static_cast<float>(tboxes(b, bb, 1)) * (width - 1);
128:         const int64 min_box_col_clamp = std::max<int64>(min_box_col, int64{0});
129:         const int64 max_box_col =
130:             static_cast<float>(tboxes(b, bb, 3)) * (width - 1);
131:         const int64 max_box_col_clamp = std::min<int64>(max_box_col, width - 1);
132: 
133:         if (min_box_row > max_box_row || min_box_col > max_box_col) {
134:           LOG(WARNING) << "Bounding box (" << min_box_row << "," << min_box_col
135:                        << "," << max_box_row << "," << max_box_col
136:                        << ") is inverted and will not be drawn.";
137:           continue;
138:         }
139:         if (min_box_row >= height || max_box_row < 0 || min_box_col >= width ||
140:             max_box_col < 0) {
141:           LOG(WARNING) << "Bounding box (" << min_box_row << "," << min_box_col
142:                        << "," << max_box_row << "," << max_box_col
143:                        << ") is completely outside the image"
144:                        << " and will not be drawn.";
145:           continue;
146:         }
147: 
148:         // At this point, {min,max}_box_{row,col}_clamp are inside the
149:         // image.
150:         CHECK_GE(min_box_row_clamp, 0);
151:         CHECK_GE(max_box_row_clamp, 0);
152:         CHECK_LT(min_box_row_clamp, height);
153:         CHECK_LT(max_box_row_clamp, height);
154:         CHECK_GE(min_box_col_clamp, 0);
155:         CHECK_GE(max_box_col_clamp, 0);
156:         CHECK_LT(min_box_col_clamp, width);
157:         CHECK_LT(max_box_col_clamp, width);
158: 
159:         // At this point, the min_box_row and min_box_col are either
160:         // in the image or above/left of it, and max_box_row and
161:         // max_box_col are either in the image or below/right or it.
162:         CHECK_LT(min_box_row, height);
163:         CHECK_GE(max_box_row, 0);
164:         CHECK_LT(min_box_col, width);
165:         CHECK_GE(max_box_col, 0);
166: 
167:         // Draw top line.
168:         if (min_box_row >= 0) {
169:           for (int64 j = min_box_col_clamp; j <= max_box_col_clamp; ++j)
170:             for (int64 c = 0; c < depth; c++) {
171:               canvas(b, min_box_row, j, c) =
172:                   static_cast<T>(color_table[color_index][c]);
173:             }
174:         }
175:         // Draw bottom line.
176:         if (max_box_row < height) {
177:           for (int64 j = min_box_col_clamp; j <= max_box_col_clamp; ++j)
178:             for (int64 c = 0; c < depth; c++) {
179:               canvas(b, max_box_row, j, c) =
180:                   static_cast<T>(color_table[color_index][c]);
181:             }
182:         }
183:         // Draw left line.
184:         if (min_box_col >= 0) {
185:           for (int64 i = min_box_row_clamp; i <= max_box_row_clamp; ++i)
186:             for (int64 c = 0; c < depth; c++) {
187:               canvas(b, i, min_box_col, c) =
188:                   static_cast<T>(color_table[color_index][c]);
189:             }
190:         }
191:         // Draw right line.
192:         if (max_box_col < width) {
193:           for (int64 i = min_box_row_clamp; i <= max_box_row_clamp; ++i)
194:             for (int64 c = 0; c < depth; c++) {
195:               canvas(b, i, max_box_col, c) =
196:                   static_cast<T>(color_table[color_index][c]);
197:             }
198:         }
199:       }
200:     }
201:   }
202: };
203: 
204: #define REGISTER_CPU_KERNEL(T)                                               \
205:   REGISTER_KERNEL_BUILDER(                                                   \
206:       Name("DrawBoundingBoxes").Device(DEVICE_CPU).TypeConstraint<T>("T"),   \
207:       DrawBoundingBoxesOp<T>);                                               \
208:   REGISTER_KERNEL_BUILDER(                                                   \
209:       Name("DrawBoundingBoxesV2").Device(DEVICE_CPU).TypeConstraint<T>("T"), \
210:       DrawBoundingBoxesOp<T>);
211: TF_CALL_half(REGISTER_CPU_KERNEL);
212: TF_CALL_float(REGISTER_CPU_KERNEL);
213: 
214: }  // namespace tensorflow

(End of file - total 214 lines)
